description_long: This small bird has an olive-brown body with subtle yellow streaks on its wings and a distinct yellow crown stripe on its head. Its underparts are lighter, with some white and buff markings along the flanks and wings. The beak is short, thin, and pointed, well-suited for picking insects or seeds. The tail is relatively short and straight, with a slightly rounded tip. The legs are slender and appear dark, blending with the overall muted coloration. The plumage pattern is a mix of soft gradients and subtle striping, giving the bird a camouflaged appearance suitable for urban parks and gardens.
description: A small olive-brown bird with a yellow crown stripe, subtle wing markings, and a short, pointed beak. Its plumage features soft gradients and faint stripes, blending well with natural surroundings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow crown stripe, olive-brown body, and subtle wing markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical wing feathers and the yellow crown stripe running down the head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar coloration, showing the short tail and pointed beak.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the beak, yellow crown, and the bird's compact body shape.
attribute_plumage_pattern: olive-brown with yellow crown stripe, faint wing bars, and subtle streaking
